/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/UrineMonitor.elf.dir/Core/Src/app_lorawan.c.o CMakeFiles/UrineMonitor.elf.dir/Core/Src/epd_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/UrineMonitor.elf.dir/Core/Src/hx711_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/UrineMonitor.elf.dir/Core/Src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/UrineMonitor.elf.dir/Core/Src/stm32wlxx_hal_mock.c.o -o UrineMonitor.elf
